content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Motivational Interviewing Network of Trainers, Incorporated: Executive Director Anywhere in the World Virginia Project Management, Strategic Thinking, Executive, Admin, Event Planning, Performance Monitoring, CRM Systems, Email Campaigns, Budget Management, Process Improvement, Relationship Building, Communication Skills, Budgeting, Data-Driven Decision Making, Relationship Building, and Motivational Interviewing All Other Remote Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5682/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://motivationalinterviewing.org/">https://motivationalinterviewing.org/</a> </p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><em><span lang="EN">Job Title</span></em></strong><strong><span lang="EN">:</span></strong><strong><span lang="EN">&nbsp; &nbsp;</span></strong><span lang="EN">Executive Director (ED)</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><em><span lang="EN">Employer:</span></em></strong><span lang="EN"> &nbsp;<a title="MINT, INC." href="https://motivationalinterviewing.org/">Motivational Interviewing Network of Trainers Inc. (MINT)</a></span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><em><span lang="EN">Reports to:</span></em></strong><span lang="EN">&nbsp; MINT Board Chair </span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><em><span lang="EN">Required Start Date</span></em></strong><strong><span lang="EN">:</span></strong><span lang="EN"> 12 October 2026</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><em><span lang="EN">Work Location(s)</span></em></strong><strong><span lang="EN">:</span></strong><span lang="EN"> Based remotely with occasional travel to conferences; MINT’s </span><span lang="EN">registered office is in<span> Reston, Virginia, USA</span></span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><em><span lang="EN">Work Hours:</span></em></strong><span lang="EN"> The ED will work on a flexible schedule, recognising that the organisation and its stakeholders are situated globally. This position is </span><span lang="EN">designed to<span> be a full-time salaried position; however, a part-time structure may be considered. Candidates interested in either a full-time or part-time position are encouraged to apply and to specify their prefer</span>ence in their application<span>.</span></span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><em><span lang="EN">Salary Range:</span></em></strong><span lang="EN"> US$90,000-$110,000 if Full-Time / US$45,000-$55,000 if Part-Time<span><span>&nbsp; </span></span></span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><em><span lang="EN">Candidate Schedule Requirements:</span></em></strong><span lang="EN"> Candidates must be available for interviews between 31 August and 11 September 2026. It is strongly preferred that </span><span lang="EN">t<span>he selected candidate be available to start on 12 October 2026 and be able to travel to Lisbon, Portugal for the MINT Annual Conference from 17 to 23 October 2026. </span></span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><em><span lang="EN">Application Deadline:</span></em></strong><span lang="EN"> 7 August 2026, subject to </span><span lang="EN">extension<span> until position is filled.</span></span></p> <p class="MsoNormal">&nbsp;</p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><em><span lang="EN">To Apply:</span></em></strong><em><span lang="EN"> </span></em></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span lang="EN">Send a resume and cover letter to</span><span lang="EN"><a href="mailto:execdirector@motivationalinterviewing.org"><span> execdirector@motivationalinterviewing.org</span></a></span><span lang="EN">&nbsp;</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>You must</span><span> type in the subject line, all caps, no spaces: “<strong>EDMINT2026</strong>”&nbsp;</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal">&nbsp;</p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><em><span lang="EN">Executive Summary:</span></em></strong></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span lang="EN">The Motivational Interviewing Network of Trainers (MINT) is an international organisation of trainers in motivational interviewing, incorporated as a 501(c)(3) tax-exempt non-profit charitable organisation in the state of Virginia, USA. The trainers come from diverse backgrounds and apply Motivational Interviewing (MI) in a variety of settings. Their central interest is to improve the quality and effectiveness of counseling and consultations with clients about behavior change. Started in 1997 by a small group of trainers trained by William R. Miller and Stephen Rollnick, the organisation has since grown to represent forty countries and more than thirty different languages.</span><span lang="EN">&nbsp;</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span lang="EN">The mission of MINT is to promote good practice in the use, research, and training of motivational interviewing. MINT supports the continuing learning and skillfulness of its members through meetings, open sharing of resources, communication, publications, and shared practice opportunities. Rather than seeking to limit or control the practice and training of motivational interviewing, MINT<strong> </strong>promotes quality applications of motivational interviewing across cultures, languages, and contexts.</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span lang="EN">The Executive Director is the Chief Executive Officer of MINT. The Executive Director reports to the Chair of the Board of Directors and is responsible for the organisation's consistent achievement of its mission and financial objectives. The ED is responsible for translating strategic vision into effective organisational execution. This role is central to ensuring operational excellence, member engagement, and alignment with MINT’s mission, values, and strategic goals.</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span lang="EN">The ED embodies the spirit of MI fully and welcomes input from the </span><span lang="EN">B<span>oard and its membership. The ED will embrace the Board and membership</span>’<span>s shared vision and guide the MINT collective toward mutually understood objectives (Mission). </span></span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span lang="EN">&nbsp;</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><em><span lang="EN">Position Overview:</span></em></strong><span lang="EN">&nbsp;</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span lang="EN">Key responsibilities include, but&nbsp;</span><span lang="EN">are<span> not
